socketedItems.secDescrText: Desecrates the ground, spawning corpses based on monsters in the current area and dealing chaos damage over time to enemies. socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. 20% increased Skill Effect Duration

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield

Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.
